QuickGearTest:
class QuickGearTest(MovingCameraScene):
    """Quick test of properly filled and meshed gears with zoom"""
    def construct(self):
        gear1 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=20, module=0.3, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.9)
        gear2 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=30, module=0.3, color=RED, fill_opacity=0.9)
        separation = gear1.pitch_radius + gear2.pitch_radius
        gear1.shift(LEFT * separation / 2)
        gear2.shift(RIGHT * separation / 2)
        gear2.rotate(PI / gear2.num_teeth)
        gear1_mob = gear1.get_mobject()
        gear2_mob = gear2.get_mobject()
        center1 = Dot(gear1.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        center2 = Dot(gear2.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        title = Text("Gear Meshing Close-Up", font_size=36)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))
        self.play(
            FadeIn(gear1_mob, scale=0.5),
            FadeIn(gear2_mob, scale=0.5),
            Create(center1),
            Create(center2),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        ratio = 20 / 30
        angle1 = 4 * PI
        angle2 = -angle1 * ratio
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, angle1, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, angle2, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            run_time=4
        )
        self.wait()
        contact_point = gear1.get_center() + RIGHT * gear1.pitch_radius
        contact_dot = Dot(contact_point, color=YELLOW, radius=0.06)
        contact_label = Text("Contact Point", font_size=20, color=YELLOW)
        contact_label.next_to(contact_dot, DOWN, buff=0.2)
        self.play(Create(contact_dot), Write(contact_label), run_time=0.5)
        self.wait(0.5)
        self.camera.frame.save_state()
        target_width = gear1.pitch_radius * 1.5
        self.play(
            self.camera.frame.animate.move_to(contact_point).set(width=target_width),
            FadeOut(title),
            FadeOut(contact_label),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait(0.5)
        small_angle1 = PI / gear1.num_teeth
        small_angle2 = -small_angle1 * ratio
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, small_angle1, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=there_and_back),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, small_angle2, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=there_and_back),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(
            Restore(self.camera.frame),
            FadeOut(contact_dot),
            FadeIn(title),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, 2*PI, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, -2*PI * ratio, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            run_time=3
        )
        self.wait()
ProperGearMeshing:
class ProperGearMeshing(Scene):
    """Demonstrate properly meshed gears with correct fill"""
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Properly Meshed Involute Gears", font_size=40)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))
        gear1 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=15, module=0.35, color=BLUE)
        gear2 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=25, module=0.35, color=RED)
        separation = gear1.pitch_radius + gear2.pitch_radius
        gear1.shift(LEFT * separation / 2)
        gear2.shift(RIGHT * separation / 2)
        gear2.rotate(PI / gear2.num_teeth)
        gear1_mob = gear1.get_mobject()
        gear2_mob = gear2.get_mobject()
        dot1 = Dot(gear1.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        dot2 = Dot(gear2.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        label1 = Text("15 teeth", font_size=24, color=WHITE)
        label1.next_to(gear1_mob, LEFT, buff=0.5)
        label2 = Text("25 teeth", font_size=24, color=WHITE)
        label2.next_to(gear2_mob, RIGHT, buff=0.5)
        self.play(
            FadeIn(gear1_mob, scale=0.5),
            FadeIn(gear2_mob, scale=0.5),
            Create(dot1),
            Create(dot2),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.play(Write(label1), Write(label2))
        self.wait()
        pitch1 = Circle(radius=gear1.pitch_radius, color=GREEN, stroke_width=2)
        pitch1.move_to(gear1.get_center())
        pitch2 = Circle(radius=gear2.pitch_radius, color=GREEN, stroke_width=2)
        pitch2.move_to(gear2.get_center())
        pitch_label = Text("Pitch Circles", font_size=20, color=GREEN)
        pitch_label.to_edge(DOWN)
        self.play(
            Create(pitch1),
            Create(pitch2),
            Write(pitch_label)
        )
        self.wait()
        ratio = 15 / 25
        angle1 = 4 * PI
        angle2 = -angle1 * ratio
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, angle1, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, angle2, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            run_time=6
        )
        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(mob) for mob in self.mobjects])
SingleGearShowcase:
class SingleGearShowcase(Scene):
    """Showcase a single gear with proper interior fill"""
    def construct(self):
        gear = SimpleGear(num_teeth=24, module=0.4, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.9)
        gear_mob = gear.get_mobject()
        center_dot = Dot(gear.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.1)
        pitch_circle = Circle(radius=gear.pitch_radius, color=GREEN, stroke_width=2)
        base_circle = Circle(radius=gear.base_radius, color=PURPLE, stroke_width=2, stroke_opacity=0.5)
        outer_circle = Circle(radius=gear.outer_radius, color=YELLOW, stroke_width=2, stroke_opacity=0.5)
        root_circle = Circle(radius=gear.root_radius, color=RED, stroke_width=2, stroke_opacity=0.5)
        circles = VGroup(base_circle, root_circle, pitch_circle, outer_circle)
        labels = VGroup(
            Text("Base", font_size=16, color=PURPLE).move_to(LEFT * (gear.base_radius + 0.6)),
            Text("Root", font_size=16, color=RED).move_to(LEFT * (gear.root_radius + 0.6)),
            Text("Pitch", font_size=16, color=GREEN).move_to(LEFT * (gear.pitch_radius + 0.6)),
            Text("Outer", font_size=16, color=YELLOW).move_to(LEFT * (gear.outer_radius + 0.6))
        )
        title = Text("Gear Geometry", font_size=48, color=WHITE)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))
        self.play(FadeIn(gear_mob, scale=0.5), Create(center_dot))
        self.wait()
        self.play(Create(circles), Write(labels), run_time=2)
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear_mob, 2*PI, about_point=gear.get_center(), rate_func=smooth),
            run_time=4
        )
        self.wait(2)
MultiColorGearTrain:
class MultiColorGearTrain(Scene):
    """Beautiful gear train with proper fills"""
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Gear Train with Interior Fill", font_size=40)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))
        colors = [RED, ORANGE, YELLOW, GREEN, BLUE]
        teeth_counts = [10, 15, 10, 20, 12]
        gears = []
        for i, (color, teeth) in enumerate(zip(colors, teeth_counts)):
            gear = SimpleGear(num_teeth=teeth, module=0.25, color=color, fill_opacity=0.85)
            gears.append(gear)
        gears[0].shift(LEFT * 4.5)
        for i in range(1, len(gears)):
            prev_gear = gears[i-1]
            curr_gear = gears[i]
            separation = prev_gear.pitch_radius + curr_gear.pitch_radius
            curr_gear.shift(prev_gear.get_center() + RIGHT * separation)
            if i % 2 == 1:
                curr_gear.rotate(curr_gear.tooth_angle / 2)
        gear_mobs = [g.get_mobject() for g in gears]
        dots = VGroup(*[Dot(g.get_center(), color=WHITE, radius=0.06) for g in gears])
        self.play(
            LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(g, scale=0.3) for g in gear_mobs], lag_ratio=0.2),
            Create(dots),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        base_angle = 2 * PI
        angles = [base_angle]
        for i in range(1, len(gears)):
            ratio = teeth_counts[i-1] / teeth_counts[i]
            angles.append(-angles[-1] * ratio)
        animations = []
        for i, gear in enumerate(gears):
            animations.append(
                Rotate(
                    gear_mobs[i],
                    angles[i],
                    about_point=gear.get_center(),
                    rate_func=linear
                )
            )
        self.play(*animations, run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(mob) for mob in self.mobjects])
PlanetaryGearSystem:
class PlanetaryGearSystem(Scene):
    """Planetary gear system with proper fills and spinning"""
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("Planetary Gear System", font_size=40)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))
        sun = SimpleGear(num_teeth=12, module=0.3, color=YELLOW, fill_opacity=0.9)
        planet1 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=12, module=0.3, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.85)
        planet2 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=12, module=0.3, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.85)
        planet3 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=12, module=0.3, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.85)
        distance = sun.pitch_radius + planet1.pitch_radius
        planet1.shift(RIGHT * distance)
        planet1.rotate(PI / planet1.num_teeth)
        planet2.shift(
            LEFT * distance * np.cos(PI/6) + UP * distance * np.sin(PI/6)
        )
        planet2.rotate(PI / planet2.num_teeth)
        planet3.shift(
            LEFT * distance * np.cos(PI/6) + DOWN * distance * np.sin(PI/6)
        )
        planet3.rotate(PI / planet3.num_teeth)
        sun_mob = sun.get_mobject()
        planet_mobs = [planet1.get_mobject(), planet2.get_mobject(), planet3.get_mobject()]
        planets = [planet1, planet2, planet3]
        sun_dot = Dot(sun.get_center(), color=WHITE, radius=0.08)
        planet_dots = VGroup(*[Dot(p.get_center(), color=WHITE, radius=0.06) for p in planets])
        self.play(FadeIn(sun_mob, scale=0.5), Create(sun_dot))
        self.wait(0.5)
        self.play(
            LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(p, scale=0.3) for p in planet_mobs], lag_ratio=0.3),
            Create(planet_dots),
            run_time=1.5
        )
        self.wait()
        sun_angle = -2 * PI
        planet_orbit_angle = 2 * PI
        planet_spin_angle = -planet_orbit_angle
        animations = [
            Rotate(sun_mob, sun_angle, about_point=sun.get_center(), rate_func=linear)
        ]
        for i, (planet, planet_mob, dot) in enumerate(zip(planets, planet_mobs, planet_dots)):
            planet_center = planet.get_center().copy()
            animations.append(
                Rotate(planet_mob, planet_orbit_angle, about_point=ORIGIN, rate_func=linear)
            )
            animations.append(
                Rotate(dot, planet_orbit_angle, about_point=ORIGIN, rate_func=linear)
            )
            def make_spin_updater(pm, initial_center, spin_angle, orbit_angle):
                def updater(mob, alpha):
                    orbit_progress = alpha * orbit_angle
                    current_center = np.array([
                        initial_center[0] * np.cos(orbit_progress) - initial_center[1] * np.sin(orbit_progress),
                        initial_center[0] * np.sin(orbit_progress) + initial_center[1] * np.cos(orbit_progress),
                        0
                    ])
                    if alpha == 0:
                        mob.angle_so_far = 0
                    else:
                        delta_angle = (alpha * spin_angle) - mob.angle_so_far
                        mob.rotate(delta_angle, about_point=current_center)
                        mob.angle_so_far = alpha * spin_angle
                return updater
            planet_mob.angle_so_far = 0
            animations.append(
                UpdateFromAlphaFunc(
                    planet_mob,
                    make_spin_updater(planet_mob, planet_center, planet_spin_angle, planet_orbit_angle)
                )
            )
        self.play(*animations, run_time=6)
        self.wait(2)
        self.play(*[FadeOut(mob) for mob in self.mobjects])
DetailedGearMeshing:
class DetailedGearMeshing(MovingCameraScene):
    """Show detailed meshing with multiple zoom levels"""
    def construct(self):
        gear1 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=24, module=0.35, color=BLUE, fill_opacity=0.9)
        gear2 = SimpleGear(num_teeth=24, module=0.35, color=RED, fill_opacity=0.9)
        separation = gear1.pitch_radius + gear2.pitch_radius
        gear1.shift(LEFT * separation / 2)
        gear2.shift(RIGHT * separation / 2)
        gear2.rotate(PI / gear2.num_teeth)
        gear1_mob = gear1.get_mobject()
        gear2_mob = gear2.get_mobject()
        center1 = Dot(gear1.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        center2 = Dot(gear2.get_center(), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        pitch1 = Circle(radius=gear1.pitch_radius, color=GREEN, stroke_width=2, stroke_opacity=0.6)
        pitch1.move_to(gear1.get_center())
        pitch2 = Circle(radius=gear2.pitch_radius, color=GREEN, stroke_width=2, stroke_opacity=0.6)
        pitch2.move_to(gear2.get_center())
        title = Text("Detailed Gear Meshing Analysis", font_size=40)
        title.to_edge(UP)
        self.play(Write(title))
        self.play(
            FadeIn(gear1_mob, scale=0.5),
            FadeIn(gear2_mob, scale=0.5),
            Create(center1),
            Create(center2),
            Create(pitch1),
            Create(pitch2),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, PI, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, -PI, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            run_time=2
        )
        contact_point = gear1.get_center() + RIGHT * gear1.pitch_radius
        contact_dot = Dot(contact_point, color=YELLOW, radius=0.08)
        contact_label = Text("Pitch Point", font_size=24, color=YELLOW)
        contact_label.next_to(contact_dot, UP, buff=0.3)
        self.play(Create(contact_dot), Write(contact_label))
        self.wait()
        self.camera.frame.save_state()
        self.play(
            self.camera.frame.animate.move_to(contact_point).set(width=6),
            FadeOut(title),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, PI/2, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, -PI/2, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.play(
            self.camera.frame.animate.set(width=3),
            FadeOut(contact_label),
            FadeOut(pitch1),
            FadeOut(pitch2),
            run_time=2
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, PI/4, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=smooth),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, -PI/4, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=smooth),
            run_time=3
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Restore(self.camera.frame),
            FadeIn(title),
            FadeIn(pitch1),
            FadeIn(pitch2),
            FadeIn(contact_label),
            run_time=2.5
        )
        self.wait()
        self.play(
            Rotate(gear1_mob, 2*PI, about_point=gear1.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            Rotate(gear2_mob, -2*PI, about_point=gear2.get_center(), rate_func=linear),
            run_time=4
        )
        self.wait(2)
